mnemonics: Master Erosion Daily Creates Outstanding Results
Hole In The Open Creates Opening Results
keyPoints: Erosion: It reduces the size of objects in an image by removing the smallest details.
Dilation: It increases the size of objects in an image by adding the smallest details.
Opening: It is the combination of Erosion and Dilation operations performed sequentially.
Closing: It is the combination of Dilation and Erosion operations performed sequentially.
Hit-or-Miss Operation: It is used to detect shapes by comparing a binary image with a given shape.
